backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a marketplace backend defining types and state for stores, products, orders, payments, vendors, and transactions, with mixins for storage, authorization, and user approval.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two variant-selection UI features (ProductDetail price/stock update and ProductCard price/stock badge update) to their respective source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes in each page, component, hook, and utility file.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Fragrance.Intl' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and ThemeProvider, and renders a shared Header/Footer layout.
frontend/src/components/admin/ApprovalDa: Admin component that lists vendor approval requests and allows approving or rejecting each vendor, showing loading skeletons and per-row processing state with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/admin/AuctionMan: Admin panel table component that lists all auctions with their status, current bid, and end time, and provides Cancel/Finalize action buttons for active auctions.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderManag: Admin panel that displays all orders in a filterable table and allows admins to update each order's status via a dropdown select.
frontend/src/components/admin/PayoutMana: Admin panel for managing vendor payouts, including a commission rate editor and a table of payouts with status update controls.
frontend/src/components/admin/PayoutStat: Small presentational component that renders a color-coded badge for a payout status (pending, processing, completed, failed).
frontend/src/components/admin/RoleAssign: Form component that allows an admin to assign a role (admin, user, or guest) to a user identified by their principal string.
frontend/src/components/admin/TradeOffer: Admin panel that lists all trade offers in a sortable table and provides a Cancel action for pending offers.
frontend/src/components/auctions/Auction: Card component that displays a summary of an auction (title, description, pricing, time left, bid count) with a navigation button to the auction detail page.
A React countdown timer component that displays time remaining until an auction ends, supporting both compact (inline) and full (block) display modes, updating every second.
Renders a responsive grid of AuctionCard components from a list of LocalAuction objects, showing an empty state message when no auctions are available.
A small badge component that displays an auction's status (active, ended, canceled, pending) with color-coded styling for each state.
frontend/src/components/auctions/BidForm: A form component for placing bids on an auction, enforcing a minimum bid above the current price and submitting via the usePlaceBid mutation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/auctions/BidHist: Displays a sorted (newest-first) list of bid entries for an auction, showing bidder address, timestamp, and bid amount, with an empty state message.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on sign-out.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: A modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name and optional email to complete profile setup, blocking dismissal until the form is submitted.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartDropdow: A popover cart icon in the navbar that shows item count and a preview list of cart items, with a link to the full cart page; redirects unauthenticated users directly to the cart route.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartItemRow: Renders a single cart item row with product image, title, variant label, quantity, line total, and a remove button that calls the useRemoveFromCart mutation.
frontend/src/components/cart/CartSummary: Displays the full cart with individual CartItemRow components, an order summary with line totals and subtotal, and a checkout button that triggers the provided onCheckout callback.
frontend/src/components/checkout/OrderRe: Renders a checkout order review panel showing cart items with images, prices, and shipping address, plus a pay button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/checkout/Shippin: Form component for collecting a shipping address with validation; renders a skip message for digital-only orders.
frontend/src/components/common/AccessDen: Displays an access-denied message with a shield icon and an optional link back to the home page.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Site footer with brand info, marketplace navigation links, legal placeholders, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation, cart icon, and an authenticated user dropdown menu with role-based links.
frontend/src/components/layout/HeroBanne: Full-width hero banner with a background image, gradient overlay, headline copy, and CTA buttons linking to products and vendor registration.
frontend/src/components/orders/OrderStat: Renders a small colored pill badge displaying a human-readable order status label.
Displays a horizontal step timeline for order statuses (pending → delivered), highlighting completed steps or showing a canceled state.
frontend/src/components/products/Product: Renders a single product card with image, price, stock status, variant selection, and buttons to add to cart or navigate to the product detail page.
Displays a responsive grid of ProductCard components with loading skeleton states and an empty-state message.
frontend/src/components/products/SearchF: Provides a filter panel UI with keyword search, category, product type, and sort-by controls that call back with updated filter state.
frontend/src/components/trade/CounterOff: Form that submits a counter trade offer by swapping the original offer's items and allowing a cash adjustment input.
frontend/src/components/trade/NewTradeOf: Form for creating a new trade offer with fields for recipient, offered/requested product IDs and quantities, and an optional cash adjustment.
frontend/src/components/trade/TradeOffer: Displays a single trade offer's details, status badge, and action buttons (accept, reject, counter, cancel) based on the current user's role.
Renders a two-column grid of TradeOfferCard components with an empty-state fallback.
Small badge component that displays a color-coded trade offer status label (pending, accepted, rejected, canceled, countered).
frontend/src/components/vendor/CreateAuc: A React form component that allows vendors to create a new auction by submitting title, description, product ID, starting price, and end time, using the useCreateAuction mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/vendor/ProductFo: A React form component for adding or editing a store product, handling fields like title, description, price, stock, category, and product type, and dispatching add or update mutations accordingly.
frontend/src/components/vendor/ProductLi: Displays a list of products for a given store with options to add, edit, or delete each product using dialog modals and the corresponding query hooks.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreForm: A modal dialog form for creating or editing a store's name, description, and contact info, using create/update store mutation hooks and pre-populating fields when editing.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreList: Renders a grid of the vendor's stores with options to create, edit, activate, or deactivate each store, delegating form interactions to StoreFormModal.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreProd: A comprehensive product management table for a store that supports adding, editing, and deleting products with variant support, converting between backend and display formats via helper functions.
frontend/src/components/vendor/StoreSele: A dropdown component that fetches and displays the current vendor's stores, allowing the user to select one by ID.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorAuc: Displays a vendor's auctions with live countdowns, bid counts, and cancel actions, plus a collapsible form to create new auctions.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorOrd: Renders a sortable table of vendor transactions showing order ID, date, item count, gross amount, commission, and net payout with a receipt navigation link.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPay: Shows summary cards for total earned and pending payout amounts, plus a detailed table of individual payouts with status badges.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorPro: A form for editing vendor profile fields (name, description, contact) that saves changes locally and shows toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/vendor/VendorReg: A registration form for new vendors to submit a store ID, name, description, and contact info, storing the vendor ID in localStorage and calling the approval mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using the user's Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via an AuthClient wrapper.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend interactions including user profiles, products, orders, auctions, trade offers, and payouts, along with local TypeScript type definitions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for a luxury fragrance color palette in light/dark modes, and adds print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin-only dashboard page that checks caller admin status and renders management panels for approvals, orders, payouts, auctions, and trade offers.
frontend/src/pages/AuctionDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single auction showing countdown timer, bid history, current price, and a bid submission form fetched by auction ID from the URL params.
frontend/src/pages/Auctions.tsx: Page that lists all active auctions in a responsive grid, showing skeletons while loading and delegating rendering to the AuctionGrid component.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Displays the shopping cart page, fetching cart items and resolving each product via a headless ProductFetcher component, then rendering them through CartSummary with an empty-state fallback.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Multi-step checkout page that collects a shipping address (skipped for digital/service products) and shows an order review before creating a checkout session via the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page featuring a hero banner, feature highlights, and a product grid populated from a search-products query, with links to the products and auctions pages.
frontend/src/pages/MyOrders.tsx: Lists the authenticated user's past orders sorted by date, showing order ID, date, item count, total, status badge, and links to the receipt page.
frontend/src/pages/NewTradeOffer.tsx: Simple page wrapper that renders the NewTradeOfferForm component with a back-link to the trade offers list.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Success page shown after a completed order, displaying the order ID and buttons to view orders or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/OrderReceipt.tsx: Printable receipt page for a specific order, showing items, total, shipping address, status, and a print button, fetched by order ID.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentCancel.tsx: Informational page shown when a payment is cancelled, displaying the optional order reference and links to return to the cart or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Displays a payment success confirmation page after a Stripe checkout, showing the session ID and buttons to navigate to orders or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Renders a detailed product page with variant selection, price/stock calculation, and an add-to-cart action, including a skeleton loading state and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListing.tsx: Shows a filterable, searchable grid of all products with a sidebar for filters and skeleton loading/empty/error states.
frontend/src/pages/TradeOffers.tsx: Displays the current user's incoming and outgoing trade offers in tabbed panels, with a button to create a new trade offer.
frontend/src/pages/VendorDashboard.tsx: Vendor dashboard page showing store selector, quick stats, store list management, store products, order history, payouts, and auctions panels for approved vendors.
frontend/src/pages/VendorProducts.tsx: Vendor-only page for managing products within a stored vendor/store ID, with guards for unauthenticated, unapproved, or store-less users.
frontend/src/pages/VendorRegistration.ts: Handles vendor registration flow with states for unauthenticated users, already-approved vendors, pending submission, and the registration form itself.
frontend/src/types/index.ts: Defines and exports all shared TypeScript interfaces and types for the frontend, including Product, Order, Auction, TradeOffer, CartItem, and various status enums.
frontend/src/utils/stripe.ts: Provides utility functions for Stripe Checkout integration, including building success/cancel redirect URLs and parsing checkout session responses from the backend.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including luxury-themed colors (gold, cream, bronze), custom fonts, box shadows, border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state for the Fragrance.Intl e-commerce app, listing existing features and a pending feature request for dynamic variant-based price and stock updates.
